task_completion.description: The agent created a calendar event with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo calendar view or event creation modal showing the title 'DevOps Workshop - Infrastructure Modernization'.

task_completion.description: The event is scheduled from Wednesday 9:00 AM to Thursday 5:00 PM and is not an all-day event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event details show the start date/time as Wednesday 09:00 (or 9:00 AM) and end date/time as Thursday 17:00 (or 5:00 PM). The 'All Day' checkbox must be unchecked or specific times must be clearly visible.

task_completion.description: The location of the event is set to Engineering Lab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location' field in the event details form contains 'Engineering Lab'.

task_completion.description: David Chen and Luis Fernandez are added as attendees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Attendees' field or participant list in the event details shows both 'David Chen' and 'Luis Fernandez'.

task_completion.description: The event description contains the required workshop details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description/notes section of the event contains the text about the workshop, specifically including the keywords 'CI/CD', 'container', and 'infrastructure'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface to create the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo Calendar app UI in a web browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The event details are entered into the actual Odoo application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is typed into Odoo's form fields (Title, Start/End, Location, Attendees, Description), not just written in a text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert the event directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows, psql, or python scripts running database insertion commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Title: 'DevOps Workshop - Infrastructure Modernization'. Target Location: 'Engineering Lab'. Required Attendees: David Chen, Luis Fernandez. Required Keywords in Description: 'CI/CD', 'container', 'infrastructure'. Start Time: Wednesday at 9:00 AM (09:00). End Time: Thursday at 5:00 PM (17:00). Event Duration: Spans 2 days. Event Type: Must NOT be marked as an all-day event (the 'All Day' checkbox must be unchecked and specific hours must be set).
